<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

:::: {.content-visible unless-format="revealjs"}
1. While editing a template using the visual editor,^[[Customize templates via editor](/guide/templates/customize-document-templates.qmd#customize-templates-via-editor)] click **{{< fa plus >}}** on any section of a template that does not have child sections.

1. Select **{{< fa align-left >}} Text Block**.

1. In the modal that opens, select the reusable blocks you want to add.

1. Click **Insert # Text Block(s) to Document**.

1. Finish editing your template, then save a new version.

::::



:::: {.content-hidden unless-format="revealjs"}
Share library blocks can be added to templates:

1. [While editing a template using the visual editor](/guide/templates/customize-document-templates.qmd#customize-templates-via-editor){target="_blank"}, click **{{< fa plus >}}** on any section of a template that does not have child sections.

1. Select **{{< fa align-left >}} Text Block**.

1. In the modal that opens, select the reusable blocks you want to add.

1. Click **Insert # Text Block(s) to Document**.

1. Finish editing your template, then save a new version.

::::
